role_summary: Configuration-driven factory responsible for instantiating and returning the appropriate Large Language Model (LLM) service client based on system settings.
finding: Centralizes provider selection logic to decouple downstream application code from specific AI backend implementations. Enforces a fail-fast validation approach for unconfigured or unsupported providers and establishes a clear extension point for integrating additional LLM services while mapping global configuration parameters to provider-specific initialization requirements.
